description: Bare word list with mixed levels (A1 through C1). No sentence context. Tests that the AI handles non-passage input: phrases and polysemous lists should be empty (no context to determine phrases or senses). Vocabulary list should contain only words within A2's range (A2-B2).
passage: happy, environment, consequence, struggle, breathe, sustainable, atmosphere, determine, reluctant, furthermore, magnificent, peculiar
